meaning: adj.猪的,猪一般的,卑鄙的,非常自私的
examples: Piggish table manners; the piggy fat-cheeked little boy and his porcine pot-bellied father; swinish slavering over food.
But the fundamental and most vicious, swinish, murderous, and unchangeable fact is that we totally misunderstand each other -- we operate on alien wave lengths.
